Spring Data for Apache Cassandra
  1. org.springframework.data.cassandra.core
  2. ReactiveCassandraOperations

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.ReactiveCassandraOperations

Packages that use ReactiveCassandraOperations
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core
Apache Cassandra core support.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.query
Query derivation mechanism for Apache Cassandra specific repositories.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.support
Support infrastructure for query derivation of Apache Cassandra specific repositories.

    ReactiveCassandraTemplate
    Primary implementation of ReactiveCassandraOperations.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AbstractReactiveCassandraQuery(ReactiveCassandraQueryMethod method, ReactiveCassandraOperations operations)
    Create a new AbstractReactiveCassandraQuery from the given CassandraQueryMethod and CassandraOperations.
     
    ReactivePartTreeCassandraQuery(ReactiveCassandraQueryMethod queryMethod, ReactiveCassandraOperations operations)
    Create a new ReactivePartTreeCassandraQuery from the given ReactiveCassandraQueryMethod and ReactiveCassandraOperations.

    Create a new ReactiveStringBasedCassandraQuery for the given query, CassandraQueryMethod, ReactiveCassandraOperations, ValueExpressionDelegate

    Create a new ReactiveStringBasedCassandraQuery for the given CassandraQueryMethod, ReactiveCassandraOperations, ValueExpressionDelegate

  • Uses of ReactiveCassandraOperations in org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.support

    Methods in org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.support with parameters of type ReactiveCassandraOperations
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RepositoryComposition.RepositoryFragments
    ReactiveCassandraRepositoryFragmentsContributor.contribute(RepositoryMetadata metadata, CassandraEntityInformation<?,?> entityInformation, ReactiveCassandraOperations operations)
    Creates RepositoryComposition.RepositoryFragments based on RepositoryMetadata to add Cassandra-specific extensions.
    protected ReactiveCassandraRepositoryFactory
    ReactiveCassandraRepositoryFactoryBean.getFactoryInstance(ReactiveCassandraOperations operations)
    Creates and initializes a RepositoryFactorySupport instance.
    protected RepositoryComposition.RepositoryFragments
    ReactiveCassandraRepositoryFactory.getRepositoryFragments(RepositoryMetadata metadata, ReactiveCassandraOperations operations)
    Creates RepositoryComposition.RepositoryFragments based on RepositoryMetadata to add Cassandra-specific extensions.
    void
    ReactiveCassandraRepositoryFactoryBean.setReactiveCassandraOperations(ReactiveCassandraOperations operations)
    Configures the ReactiveCassandraOperations used for Cassandra data access operations.
    Constructors in org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.support with parameters of type ReactiveCassandraOperations
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ReactiveCassandraRepositoryFactory(ReactiveCassandraOperations cassandraOperations)
    Create a new ReactiveCassandraRepositoryFactory with the given ReactiveCassandraOperations.
     
    SimpleReactiveCassandraRepository(CassandraEntityInformation<T,ID> metadata, ReactiveCassandraOperations operations)
    Create a new SimpleReactiveCassandraRepository for the given CassandraEntityInformation and ReactiveCassandraOperations.
